title: Set contextdir to current PWD if user did not specify a context dir.
body:
This matches the behavour of buildah bud.

Grabbing the contextdir based on the path to a Dockerfile, makes little sense.
I believe this is more likely what the user would expect.  If the context
directory was should be a different directory then the user must specify it.

The man page documentation actually conflicted on this.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4695
